AR1.justification: Correctly declined to route the deletion anywhere; explicitly proposed that if the user still wants it gone, it should be logged in decisions.md as a commitment (proposed -> accepted), matching the methodology's strict bar for decisions.

AR2.justification: n/a - not a procedure/runbook scenario, so artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: References to AGENTS.md, methodology.md, decisions.md, observations.md, and runbooks/AGENTS.md use bare relative names consistent with workspace convention and all resolve in the workspace.

AR4.justification: Made no filesystem mutations and proposed an append-only path (new decision entry) for any future removal, so re-running would not corrupt history.
